mapper.select:
SELECT r.reception_id, r.reception_no, r.patient_id, p.name AS patient_name, r.visit_type, r.department_id, d.department_name AS department_name, r.doctor_id, doc.full_name AS doctor_name, r.reservation_id, r.scheduled_at, r.arrived_at, r.status, r.note, NVL(r.is_active, 1) AS is_active, ia.admission_datetime AS admission_plan_at, ba.ward_id, ba.room_id, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM RECEPTION r LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.patient_id = r.patient_id LEFT JOIN CMH.STAFF_DEPARTMENT d ON d.department_id = TO_CHAR(r.department_id) LEFT JOIN CMH.STAFF doc ON doc.staff_id = TO_CHAR(r.doctor_id) AND doc.staff_id LIKE 'DOC-%' AND UPPER(TRIM(NVL(doc.employment_status, 'ACTIVE'))) = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN inpatient_admission ia ON ia.reception_id = r.reception_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bed_latest.* FROM ( SELECT iba.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY iba.inpatient_admission_id ORDER BY iba.assignment_datetime DESC, iba.bed_assignment_id DESC ) AS rn FROM inpatient_bed_assignment iba ) bed_latest WHERE bed_latest.rn = 1 ) ba ON ba.inpatient_admission_id = ia.inpatient_admission_id
r.visit_type = 'INPATIENT'
AND p.name = #{searchValue}
AND r.status = #{searchValue}
AND ba.ward_id = TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{searchValue}, '^[0-9]+$'))
AND ba.room_id = TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{searchValue}, '^[0-9]+$'))
ORDER BY admission_plan_at ASC NULLS LAST
